headline: Exxon (XOM) flashes key signals on New Jersey exit
summary: Exxon Mobil (XOM) officially moved its legal home from New Jersey to Texas this week. The move became official on July 1, as shareholders had already approved it. Exxon also won a major legal battle. On June 23, the U.S. Supreme Court ruled 6-3 in Exxon's favor. The ruling revives an old lawsuit ...

headline: XOM, QatarEnergy Reach Milestone in Cyprus Offshore Gas Development
